title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Wockhardt Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Wockhardt Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
